message.content:
The visible sections in the screenshot are:  
- Navigation bar (with menu items like Home, Services, Portfolio, etc.)  
- Portfolio section (displaying project cards like “E-Commerce Platform,” “Healthcare App,” etc.)  

For the specific elements asked:  
- Trusted Brands strip: Not visible.  
- Services section: Not visible (only a “Services” menu item in the navigation, not a dedicated section in the screenshot).  
- Stats banner: Not visible.  
- Portfolio section: Visible.  

The answer is Trusted Brands strip: No, Services section: No, Stats banner: No, Portfolio section: Yes
